description: Color Combat Zone Units in Action!! Great book for those who love coloring MILITARY theme pages. The book pictures are of special units, fighting enemies in Afghanistan, Iraq, Syria on the Land and Air! Perfect for 4th of July, INDEPENDENCE DAY, VETERANS DAY, MEMORIAL DAY, and all patriotic holidays. LARGE = 8.5x11 inch pages! THIS BOOK has 25 coloring pages each image is on it's own sheet! Honor and respect the military which protects us and protects freedom. Relaxing coloring, stress relief activity book, calm the body and mind while you wait for those brave soldiers to return home.
